rationale: The cited paper is directly about consumer responses to rank information (imprecise top-X claims and expectation-based inferences), and the citing note explicitly frames its gap against prior ranked-list work on static rank/list-size/rank-claim format before extending to dynamic rank changes. That thematic alignment suggests the citation is likely part of the core prior literature rather than a purely incidental mention. The reference is also an exact DOI match (10.1509/jmr.14.0379).
